edges.clue: A guest book records who came by.

A gatekeeper decides who gets through.

A house pet lives with people at home.

A bookkeeper handles accounts and balances.
A club shop sells team gear and member items.
A gatehouse stands beside the main entrance.

A shop sells food from produce to pantry basics.

A market sells food from produce to prepared meals.

A dance club fills up once the music starts.
